title: sv.messaging.multicast.output
description: Output of sv.messaging.multicast — per-target delivery acknowledgements (ADR-0049). The message is delivered to every target in parallel; each entry reports whether it reached that target's mailbox. It is NEVER the targets' responses.

threadId.description: Id of the thread the message was delivered on.

delivered.description: True when the message was durably enqueued in the target's mailbox.

error.description: Failure reason when delivery did not succeed; null otherwise.
